nodes.name: coding-style.md
nodes.summary: ECC always-follow rule document prescribing Ruby coding standards, including RuboCop-based formatting/linting, Rails style conventions, and structured error handling with begin/rescue.

nodes.name: hooks.md
nodes.summary: ECC rule document defining PostToolUse hook patterns for Ruby projects, covering RuboCop auto-correction triggers, warning thresholds, and CI gate integration suggestions.

nodes.name: patterns.md
nodes.summary: ECC rule document prescribing idiomatic Ruby/Rails architectural patterns across persistence (ActiveRecord), background jobs, frontend (Hotwire/Stimulus), and authentication (Devise/Warden).

nodes.name: security.md
nodes.summary: ECC rule document mandating Ruby/Rails security practices including Rails defaults (CSRF, param whitelisting), SQL injection prevention via ActiveRecord, session management, dependency auditing with Bundler-Audit, and web safety controls.

nodes.name: testing.md
nodes.summary: ECC rule document specifying Ruby testing standards using RSpec with FactoryBot and Faker, covering the test pyramid (unit/integration/system), fixture management, and coverage thresholds via SimpleCov.
